monitor_the_situation.title: Israeli Forces Kill Child in Qalandia Camp, West Bank
— S3 · Conflict · Qalandia Camp, West Bank, Palestine · 4h ago. Israeli forces killed a child named Walid on the roof of his home in Qalandia refugee camp north of Jerusalem.

— S3 · Conflict · West Bank, Palestine · 7h ago. A Palestinian infant died in the occupied West Bank after Israeli forces obstructed access to emergency medical care.
